title: AI Filmmaking Tutorial: Character Consistency Fixed!
summary: ImagineArt Film Studio is an AI video generation platform that addresses character consistency in multi-shot sequences through storyboard mode and preset-based generation. It provides built-in timeline editing, camera controls, and multi-shot chaining within a single browser interface.
